event_info: a gentle loosener and a near run-out - fuller length delivery and on the pads and Head was beaten on the flick. Rolled to the right of the keeper - Rishabh Pant dived across to make the stop and Head was haring for a quick single; has to scramble back in time
short of a good length and at the stumps; turned to the on-side
fuller length short of length on the pads; Head cleared his left leg and gets an inside edge to the on -side
on a good length and just outside off - Head plays away from hid body and gets an inside edge onto the pad; rolls to the off-side
full and swinging into the left-hander; Abhishek leans across and jams it to the on-side

ball_event: out Caught by Manimaran Siddharth!! Edged and caught! The slower ball outside off and Abhishek went hard on the drive
event_info: gets a thick edge and the ball loops to the right of short third. Siddarth dives across; gets both hands under and holds on with ease. Shami has a good match-up against Abhishek and he's sent him packing once again. Abhishek Sharma c Manimaran Siddharth b Mohammed Shami 0(2)
a long hop from Digvesh; dragged short and down leg - Head clears his left leg and then whips it behind square on the on-side; runs away to the ropes
Digvesh tosses one on middle and leg; worked down to long-on for a single
pushed through on middle; Ishan goes back in defence
dragged short and wide of off; Ishan chops it hard and straight to the fielder at cover-point
flighted delivery outside off - driven down to long-off for a single
fraction short and just outside off - punched down to long-off for a single

ball_event: out Caught by Aiden Markram!! Another slower ball and Shami finds himself on a hat-trick. The cutter from the wily speedster
event_info: angled across the left-hander and undid Head completely with the lack of pace - the left-hander is through with the shot early; tries to check it at the last moment and spoons it in the air towards mid-off. Markram dives forward and completes a simple catch. Travis Head c Aiden Markram b Mohammed Shami 7(8) [4s-1]
short of a good length and angling across the right-hander; left alone
fuller length delivery and angling down leg; past Livingstone's flick and is called as a wide
short of a good length and angling across the left-hander; Livingstone watches it closely; lifts his bat and lets it go
Shami shortens the length outside off.; Livingstone plays close to the body and defends it
on a length and just outside off - punched with a straight bat to cover
back of a length and just outside off - steered backward of square on the off-side for a single
short of a good length and just outside off - Livingstone stands tall and punches it to backward point
short of a good length and at the stumps; punched in front of mid-on and he's off for a quick single - Digvesh is quick on the ball and has a shy at the bowler's end; making Livingstone scramble

ball_event: out Bowled!! Cleaned up! This is mighty fine bowling from LSG once again. They had DC in a pickle the other night
event_info: they've SRH in a hole now. Abhishek; Head and now Ishan Kishan; all gone. Pitched up and nipping back into the left-hander; drew Ishan Kishan into an ambitious drive; the late swing is his undoing as the ball bursts through the bat-pad gap and knocks out the off-stump from its perch. Ishan Kishan b Prince Yadav 1(4)
short of a good length and shaping away from outside off; Klaasen plays inside the line and lets it go
short of a good length and holding its line outside off; left alone
on a good length and just outside off - a half-forward Klaasen defends it to the off-side
short of a good length and at the pads; whipped uppishly and straight to the fielder at mid-wicket

change of pace and he nearly had another wicket; rolled his fingers across the seam and gets it to cut back into the right-hander - beats Livingstone completely; he's early into the drive and the ball goes past the inside edge

leading edge and Livingstone gets away; pitched up and holding its line around off; Livingstone was early into the flick; closed the face of the bat and the leading edge popped up in the air; right through the gap between cover-point and backward point
short of a good length and angling back into the right-hander - Livingstone swipes across the line and misses; off his body and rolled to the off-side
fuller length delivery outside off - Livingstone goes hard on the drive and loses his shape completely; skews it off the outer half and clears cover; comes back for the second
short of a good length and just outside off - Livingstone walks forward and dabs it to backward point
flighted delivery on middle and leg; turned to the on-side
fraction short and on off; punched off the back-foot to cover
Siddharth tosses one just outside off - Klaasen stays back and punches it to long-off for a single
Siddharth slides one around off; Livingstone gets half-forward as he defended
thumped; Livingstone has had enough of blocking; comes down the pitch; doesn't get very close to the ball and that allows him to free his arms - sends it high and deep into the stands at long-on
pushed through by Siddharth; driven back at the bowler
short of a good length and just outside off - Klaasen plays close to his body and runs it to backward point
banged in short and just outside off - Klaasen swivels across and pulls it through mid-wicket for a single
on a good length and just outside off - Livingstone lets the ball come and runs it down to third man
slower short ball outside off - Klaasen rides the bounce and dabs it square on the off-side for a single
short of a good length and just outside off - Livingstone plays close to his body and steers it to cover-point
the slower short ball outside off - Livingstone has to wait on the pull; he adjusts and gets it through mid-wicket for a single

ball_event: out Caught by Rishabh Pant!! Liam Livingstone falls and the slide continues for the SRH
event_info: but how good was Rishabh Pant's anticipation here? Was tossed up slower and well outside off and the right-hander set himself up for the paddle. But the slowness of the surface is what cost him; he's through with the shot; the ball never arrives and when it does; all he can do is to pop it off the edge and it then brushed his right shoulder. Rishabh Pant was initially hopping to his left; but he changes directions; dives and completes a fine one-handed take. Liam Livingstone c Rishabh Pant b Digvesh Singh Rathi 14(20) [6s-1]
flighted delivery outside off; Nitish backs away and cuts it straight to the fielder at backward point
dropped short and well wide of off - cut away square on the off-side
pushed through outside off; Klaasen makes room and chops it towards cover
beaten; the leg-break and Digvesh is beaten all ends up; drifts in and spins away past the poking bat-face
tossed up just outside off; driven into the gap wide of cover for a single
short of a good length and just outside off - Nitish was hopping across and is undone by the bounce
fuller length delivery on off; punched back at the bowler
on a good length and angling into the right-hander; turned to the on-side
short of a good length and well wide of off; cut away square on the off-side for a single
back of a length and well wide of off; pulled down to long-on for a single
fuller length delivery outside off; driven straight to the fielder at cover
an under-edge and it goes through Rishabh Pant's legs; pushed through outside off and Klaasen went hard on the cut; flicks Pant's right leg and nearly goes all the way
slower and just outside off - pushed off the back-foot to the off-side

a big appeal for LBW; but the ball might've been sliding down leg - wass pushed through by Siddharth and Nitish was shaping for the reverse sweep. Was through with the shot early and missed. Ball-tracking has it clipping leg-stump; so would've stayed with the onfield call
Nitish comes down the pitch to a well flighted delivery and picks out mid-on with the drive
tossed up just outside off - eased down to long-off for a single
Siddharth darts one quicker and wider of off as Klaasen backed away; left alone
132.1kph; full delivery outside off; Nitish swings hard through the line to tonk it over long-off. High and handsome for an 80m six
shortened length; tucked through midwicket
136.7kph; low full toss; flicked through backward square leg
slower ball into the deck; NKR waits and pulls to the right of long-on
134.2kph; full toss from Prince and that's been dispatched. Klaasen swings hard to muscle the heave over deep midwicket
slower ball bouncer; pulled to deep midwicket. 16 runs off the over
flat ball on a length just outside off; cut to deep backward point
90.7kph; length ball; Nitish goes on the back foot and straight-pulls it between the bowler and the non-striker. Excellent contact and no chance for long-on to stop that
back-to-back fours! Digvesh serves width outside off. Nitish waits for it on the back foot to cut it behind backward point
in-drifter on off; knocked to long-on and Klaasen calls for the second. Good call from the non-striker and Nitish responds
101.4kph; punched through cover off the back foot
fraction short; Klaasen punches it straight down the ground and long-on mops it up
shot! Fullish ball on the stumps; Nitish shimmies down the track; moves leg-side in the process and drives inside-out over extra cover
low full toss outside off; drilled to deep cover

dropped! Full delivery; Klaasen swings hard across the line but doesn't quite middle it. Mukul runs to his right from deep midwicket and dives as he goes with both hands. Fails to hold onto it. How costly will it be?
full delivery; driven along the ground to long-on
fired full outside off; it's just inside the tramline and Klaasen shoulders arms
Siddharth persists with the wide line. Klaasen walks across to drill it to deep cover
short and outside off; Klaasen spots it. Moves leg-side and lifts his back leg to flay it over extra cover. One bounce and into the fence
hard length from Avesh; Klaasen backs away; plays on the rise to force it through the gap between cover and mid-off. Klaasy shot!
slower ball outside off on a back of a length; pulled to the left of deep midwicket for a couple more
third boundary of the over! 131.1kph; overpitched outside off; Klaasen crouches low and batters it to the left of the diving extra cover fielder. Bullets away to the fence

Klaasen stands tall; fetches this slower ball from outside off and pulls hard through midwicket. The man in the deep runs to his left and dives but to no avail. It's suddenly raining boundaries in Hyderabad
130.3kph; punched to long-off. 19 runs off the over
flat and quick outside off; hint of away spin as well; stabbed to sweeper cover
full and in the slot; Nitish gets under it and tonks it. Mighty swing of the bat to bludgeon it high and over long-on
six more! 100.4kph; overpitched delivery outside off and Nitish swings through the line. Not quite off the middle of the bat but he's muscled it over long-off
Digvesh pulls his length back and Nitish pulls to deep midwicket

expects the line to be outside off and shapes to play the reverse-sweep. Doesn't connect. Digvesh wants to review it. Pant has a word with the bowler and decides to send it upstairs. No part of the ball inside the guideline; says Nitin Menon and LSG burn a review
97.5kph; the line is wide again; Klaasen reaches for it and stabs it to deep cover
third six of the over and this is a monstrous hit from NKR! 99.3kph; full and in the hitting arc. Nitish clears his front leg; gets under the ball and swings hard to pump it over long-on
slot ball from Prince. Full and angling in; Klaasen swings through the line to loft it over long-off for an 80m six
slower ball into the deck; gently pulled to midwicket
Nitish clears his front leg and slashes hard; chops it straight to the man at cover
135.2kph; yorker length; Nitish drives along the ground to long-on
137.5kph; another one in the blockhole; Klaasen brings his bat down just in time to jam it back to the bowler
slow and short; Klaasen pulls towards backward square leg. Back-to-back fifties for Heinrich Klaasen who raises his bat as there's a big roar from the crowd
132.3kph; yorker length; Klaasen flicks through square leg
Player of the Match for his all-round performance in the previous match; fifty today with his team in deep trouble. NKR does his trademark Pushpa celebration. Very full and Nitish drives to long-off
134.4kph; Klaasen hangs back to squeeze-drive this yorker length delivery to the right of deep cover. Hundred partnership
130.8kph; wide of the crease; shortened length outside off; Klaasen hops to slap it to deep cover
wide yorker; jammed back to the bowler

incredible shot! The six off the last ball spoils the over. Avesh misses his yorker; Nitish stays back and clears his front leg. Manufactures enough power to carve it over deep extra cover. That came right off the meat of the bat
darted full on the stumps from round the wicket; Klaasen manages to get under it and swings hard over the bowler's head
low full toss outside off; drilled to the left of long-off. The throw comes to the keeper but Klaasen is comfortably in
low full toss outside off; Klaasen belts it over extra cover. Prince runs in and does well to take it on the half-volley
111.3kph; quick outside off; well outside the tramline and Nitish shoulders arms

ball_event: out Caught by Prince Yadav!! The 116-run stand has been broken! 113.6kph
event_info: very full outside off; Nitish swings hard to try and biff it over extra cover. Doesn't get the necessary elevation and holes out to deep extra cover where Prince makes no mistake. End of a fantastic knock from NKR. Nitish Reddy c Prince Yadav b Manimaran Siddharth 56(33) [4s-3 6s-5]
very full; darted in towards middle; driven hard and along the ground to long-off
114.1kph; fired full outside off and Klaasen wristily sweeps to deep midwicket. LSG will be happy with that over - 10 runs and NKR's wicket

ball_event: out Caught by Rishabh Pant!! Heinrich Klaasen tries to be cheeky and perishes. 131.7kph
event_info: full and angling in towards off; Klaasen tries to reverse it and gets it too fine for his liking. Rishabh Pant dives to his right to complete the catch. Both the half-centurions dismissed within a span of four deliveries. Heinrich Klaasen c Rishabh Pant b Avesh Khan 62(41) [4s-5 6s-2]

ball_event: out Bowled!! Two in two for Avesh Khan! Harsh Dubey shimmies down the pitch and moves leg-side to try and access the off-side. It was on a short of length and all the batter could do was chop it back onto the stumps. Harsh Dubey b Avesh Khan 0(1)
event_info: out Bowled!! Two in two for Avesh Khan! Harsh Dubey shimmies down the pitch and moves leg-side to try and access the off-side. It was on a short of length and all the batter could do was chop it back onto the stumps. Harsh Dubey b Avesh Khan 0(1)
pacy length ball angling in; Shivang Kumar defends from the crease and the ball rolls gently towards the keeper
very full and tailing in; wristed towards long-on
yorker length outside off; jammed to extra cover where a tumbling Marsh makes a good stop
low full toss; swung away to deep midwicket. Excellent over from Avesh - 2 runs and 2 wickets off the penultimate over of the innings
1 run; 135.3kph; yorker angling in; Aniket Verma flicks and misses. Brushes the right leg and Pant dives to his left to save three runs
over short fine! Low full toss; Shivang shuffles across; gets low and inside the line to scoop it over the man at 45. SRH cross 150

Prince Yadav nails the yorker. Shivang clears his front leg to drill it through the covers. He's beaten for pace and the ball crashes into the base of the off-stump. Too good for the No. 9 batter. Shivang Kumar b Prince Yadav 5(4) [4s-1]

Harshal gets going with a boundary. Prince misses his yorker by a couple of inches and Harshal clears his front leg to drive it aerially over extra cover. One bounce and into the fence as long-off can't cut it off
1 run; slower ball into the deck; Harshal Patel pulls and misses. Pant fails to stop it cleanly and the batters take a run via byes. SRH review for a wide but it's below the head. SRH lose a review

ball_event: out Harshal Patel Run Out!! Rishabh Pant hits the bullseye! Pace-off delivery wide of off
event_info: Aniket slashes hard and misses. The batters try to steal a single but Pant - who had removed his glove - finds the target to catch Harshal short of his crease. Harshal Patel run out (Rishabh Pant) 4(2) [4s-1]
flighted delivery on off; Marsh goes back and flicks it wide of mid-on for a single
flighted delivery outside off; driven down to long-off for a single
flighted delivery on middle; clipped off the back-foot to mid-wicket
the slider now; hurries onto the right-hander and Markram does well to get his bat down in time
flighted just outside off - Markram prods forward and pushes it to the off-side
the slider from Dubey - Markram backs away and jabs it to the off-side
on a good length and a hint of nip back into the right-hander - Marsh was half-forward and gets a thick inside edge onto the thigh-pad
short of a good length and stopping onto the right-hander; Markram reaches out and stabs it to the off-side
whipped and whipped over mid-wicket; on a length and at the stumps; Markram leant across and has to wait onto the shot; gets enough to clear the fielder in the ring and runs away to the ropes
back-to-back boundaries for Markram; width on offer and he slaps the drive past cover; stayed on the front-foot and got the elevation on the shot
pitched up by Nitish - Markram leans across and drives it to mid-off's right for a single
hammered; tad too full from Nitish - Marsh leans forward; presents the full face of the bat and drills the drive over mid-off for a boundary
fraction short and on off; punched down to long-off for a single
tossed up on middle and leg; worked off the back-foot and to mid-on's right
clubbed; tossed up just outside off - Markram gets a good stride forward and then lifts it over mid-off; bounces away to the ropes
Harsh drags the length back around off; punched off the back-foot to long-off
flatter and at the stumps; eased off the back-foot to the bowler
flatter and quicker of off; Marsh stays back and drives it down to long-off
short of a good length and angling across the right-hander; forced away off the back-foot through cover-point. The fielder in the deep sprints to his right and keeps them down to a single
on a good length and at the stumps; pushed back at the bowler
cracking shot; back of a length and at the stumps - Markram stands tall; lets the ball come and then brings the bottom-hand into play; whiplashes it high over long-on for a maximum
on a good length and angling into the right-hander; defended to the on-side
slower short ball outside off - hacked through mid-wicket for a single
slower short ball outside off - Marsh waits on it and then helps it through mid-wicket with the pull
Malinga starts with a slower ball; dips in front of the right-hander and beats Marsh's almighty swing
short of a good length and angling into the right-hander; Marsh is cramped for room and miscues the pull to mid-wicket
cracking shot; the slower short ball outside off - sits up to the right-hander and Marsh forces it away off the back-foot - stands tall and punches it through extra-cover

ball_event: out Caught by Nitish Reddy!! Catching practice at deep square leg and Malinga has broken through. Banged into the pitch and Marsh doesn't get hold of the pull - he was staying on the front-foot
event_info: the ball hits slightly high on the bat and he lobs a simple catch to deep square leg. Nitish Reddy under the ball and he doesn't drop those. Mitchell Marsh c Nitish Reddy b Eshan Malinga 14(12) [4s-2]
on a good length and just outside off - punched off the back-foot to cover-point
on a good length and well wide of off; steered backward of square on the off-side for a single
length ball on middle; Pant closes the face of the bat and tucks it to the left of mid-wicket
uppish and four; back of a length and just outside off - Markram stands tall and then punches it through the off-side; was in the air for a long time; but he's placed it to perfection
on a good length and just outside off; driven on the rise and straight to the fielder at extra-cover; who was placed before this ball
drilled; a low full-toss on off; Markram gets down low and the bottom-hand came off on impact; was in the air and past Unadkat even before he could react
slower short ball outside off - Markram swivels across on the pull and misses; bounces through to the keeper
clubbed; another slower short ball from Unadkat; Markram picks the length early and then hammers the pull. There's a fielder in the deep; but he can only watch it go over his head
Harshal starts with a slower ball outside off - Pant leans across into the drive and finds mid-off

that was ugly; slower short ball well down leg; would've been a wide had Pant let it go - but he's through with the pull early; the ball flicks the underside of the glove and runs to the left of Ishan Kishan; who was wrong-footed
fuller length delivery at the stumps; driven down to long-on for a single
full-toss on off; a miscued drive to long-on for a single
on a length and at the stumps; punched down to long-on for a single
short of a length and into the pitch; Pant fore-hands the slap and mistimes it to the off-side
tossed up on off; driven down to long-off for a single
fraction short and spinning away from off; Pant lets the ball turn and then cuts it into the gap wide of cover; comes back for the second
tad too short from Shivang - punched off the back-foot to deep point
slugged; tossed up well wide of off - Markram clears his front-leg and then swipes it over the non-striker's head; bounces away to the ropes
the wrong 'un; drifting away from off and finds the edge off Markram's bat; rolls behind point for a single

1 run; that's beaten everyone; was the wrong 'un and Pant didn't spot it; went back on the cut and misses; the ball didn't miss the off-stump by much and a hopping Ishan Kishan doesn't collect it cleanly; allowing a bye

a miscue; but Pant has got enough to clear Livingstone at mid-off - on a good length and pushed across the left-hander; Pant swiped hard and got a thick outside edge. Lobbed up and had the back-tracking fielder interested; but only for a while

he now gets it wide of Shivang at deep backward square leg; on a length and at the pads; whipped away over backward square leg. Shivang ran to his right; but the ball was always going away from his reach; one bounce and over the ropes
the slower short ball; pushed across the left-hander - Pant swipes across the line and misses; bounces through to the keeper
an appeal for LBW; was full and at the pads; beat Pant's flick; but that was always heading down leg
full-toss outside off and it's driven wide of cover; Pant comes back for the second
slower ball wide of off - Pant reaches out on the drive and flat-bats it to the left of extra-cover. A diving effort by the fielder to keep them down to a single
dropped short by Shivang - Pant rocks back and pulls it to deep mid-wicket for a single

ball_event: out Caught by Liam Livingstone!! A slice and Markram has holed out to long-off - was the wrong 'un and he was looking to go back over the bowler's head
event_info: but the ball turns away; catches the outside half and Livingstone is under it at long-off. A simple catch and Shivang is delighted at his maiden IPL wicket. Aiden Markram c Liam Livingstone b Shivang Kumar 45(27) [4s-6 6s-2]
tossed up just outside off - Badoni makes room and pushes it to cover-point for a single
Pant comes down the pitch to a well flighted delivery and pushes it down to long-on
tossed up well outside leg; swept backward of square on the on-side for a single
flighted delivery on off; Pant looks to drive and inside halves it to long-on
slow and short; Pant pulls it to short fine leg off the inner edge
132.6kph; full delivery outside off; Ayush Badoni presses forward and opens the bat-face to drive to the right of backward point. Shivang runs and dives to his left but can't stop the boundary
slower ball from wide of the crease; full in length and that's been clipped to long-on
121kph; Pant goes on the back foot to cut; can't find the gap through backward point
dug in short; no room on offer and Pant pulls to deep backward square leg
121kph; off-speed full delivery outside off; push-driven to the right of backward point who makes a sliding stop
full outside off; Badoni leans forward to drive to the right of deep cover for a couple of runs
googly on a length; Badoni stays back to work it through midwicket
drifting in on middle; Pant nurdles it to short fine leg and the batters scamper across for a quick single. A direct-hit would have been curtains for Ayush Badoni
googly on a full length outside off; Badoni gets low to sweep it through midwicket
91.4kph; overpitched delivery outside off and that's been punished. Pant gets forward and swings hard to thump it over extra cover. One bounce and into the fence
85.5kph; googly on a shortish length. Pant spots it; treks back quickly and hammers the pull over square leg. Back-to-back fours to end the over and 100 up for LSG

ball_event: out Stumped!! Harsh comes back and provides the breakthrough! 99.5kph
event_info: full and quick outside off. Ayush Badoni shimmies down the ground; yorks himself and fails to lay bat on ball. Ishan Kishan gathers it cleanly to effect the stumping. Ayush Badoni st Ishan Kishan b Harsh Dubey 12(9) [4s-1]
100.5kph; quick ball outside off; left alone
full and on the stumps; Pooran swings hard to drill it to long-on
99kph; low full toss on the pads; worked through backward square leg
1 run; 105.3kph; fired onto the pads; Pooran is late on the flick and the ball rolls to square leg off the pad
quick non-turner outside off; Pant reaches for it to cut and finds backward point. Just 3 runs and a wicket off the over

ball_event: out Nicholas Pooran Run Out!! Game on! 91.2kph
event_info: Pooran gets low to sweep and gets an under-edge on it. He thinks the ball will elude the keeper and takes off. The ball instead goes to the keeper on the bounce and Ishan Kishan is quick to break the stumps. Good anticipation from Ishan there who moved to his right and got into a good position. Nicholas Pooran run out (Ishan Kishan) 1(4)
dropped short and Abdul Samad gets off the mark by pulling it to deep midwicket
full in-drifter; Pant shimmies down to drive and almost chips it back to the bowler. Shivang Kumar takes it on the bounce
full delivery; pushed back to the bowler
googly; fraction short; hurriedly pulled to deep midwicket
fullish ball on off; driven down to long-off
full delivery; firmly driven to the left of long-off who makes a tumbling stop and keeps the batters down to two
pitched up ball; driven straight to the man at extra cover

slower ball into the deck; Samad hops to cut it to the right of backward point. Shivang makes a diving stop to his right. Malinga applauds and there's a roar from the crowd as well. There's still belief in the SRH camp
off-speed ball on a short of length outside off; chopped to deep point
108.6kph; slower full delivery; driven to deep point
113.5kph; pace off again; Pant dabs it to point and hares to the other end
back of a length; the line is down leg; Pant swivels and pulls it square of the short fine leg fielder. Poor line and punished
Pant comes down the track; waits and pulls this off-speed short ball to deep midwicket for a couple of runs
130.5kph; low full toss and Pant brings his wrists into play to flick it through backward square leg. Second boundary of the over and Unadkat has his arms on his hips
slower ball bouncer; a shuffling Pant just drops it towards square leg and runs hard to take a couple more. Ishan Kishan moved swiftly to get to the ball
slow and short; pulled through backward square leg
131.6kph; drives this full delivery along the ground to deep cover. 14 runs off the over
138.7kph; full delivery; Samad drills it hard down the ground. Long-on didn't have to move much but the ball went to the fence like a bullet. Struck so hard
slower ball on a short of length; Samad pushes it to backward point off the back foot
goes over the fielder now. Slow and on a shortish length outside off. Samad spots it; hops and throws his arms to slash it over backward point
115.6kph; very full; Samad chips it over the bowler's head. Long-off tidies up
off-cutter into the deck; Pant shapes to slap it through the covers and gets beaten by the lack of pace
off-speed delivery wide of off; cut to deep backward point
Pant shimmies down; gets too close to the pitch of the ball and jams it back to the bowler. The crowd thinks that it's a catch. Clearly hit the deck
shortened length outside off; slapped to extra cover
Pant is on the walk to whip this quick delivery on a length through midwicket

ball_event: out Caught by Liam Livingstone!! Holes out! SRH are very much alive in this contest. Full delivery and Samad decides to go for the big hit. It was actually in his arc and hence swung through the line. Strikes hard but miscues and hits it straight down long-off's throat. Abdul Samad c Liam Livingstone b Harsh Dubey 16(12) [4s-2]
event_info: out Caught by Liam Livingstone!! Holes out! SRH are very much alive in this contest. Full delivery and Samad decides to go for the big hit. It was actually in his arc and hence swung through the line. Strikes hard but miscues and hits it straight down long-off's throat. Abdul Samad c Liam Livingstone b Harsh Dubey 16(12) [4s-2]
98.9kph; very full outside off; driven to long-off

102.3kph; low full toss; Pant drives hard and down the ground. Livingstone sprints to his right from long-on and slides to his right. Good effort but he ends up palming it past the boundary rope. The boundary also brings up Pant's fifty! Not his most fluent knock but this should give him a lot of confidence
low full toss; flicked over midwicket and long-on moves to his right to take it on the bounce
no run
off-speed shortish ball outside off; Pant walks forward to slap it to deep cover. NKR misfields and the batters come back for the second
low full toss outside off; Pant throws the kitchen sink and slices it through cover

Mukul Choudhary walks across a long way to play the scoop. It's a pace-off delivery on a short of length. Beats the inside-edge before going into the keeper's gloves. SRH ponder and decide not to review it. Don't think there was a nick there
full toss; Mukul swipes and toe-ends it back to the bowler. Back-to-back dots and Mukul will be under a bit of pressure

full toss from Harshal Patel; Mukul Choudhary looks to heave it across the line and misses to get hit on the back thigh. The ball dipped on the batter but the impact seems to be outside off. Given out onfield; let's see what ball-tracking says. UltraEdge confirms no bat. Impact outside off and it's a successful review. Excellent penultimate over from Harshal - just 4 off it
boundary to start the over! Pitched up delivery; Pant stays leg-side and drives hard straight down the ground. Unadkat tries to stop it with his boot but it eludes him and runs away to the fence

Rishabh Pant is off-balance; the bottom hand comes off the bat handle but he's hit another boundary. Pace off on a back of a length; Pant moves leg-side to forehand-slap and manages to elevate it over mid-off. Scores level
yorker outside off; Pant jams it to cover and the batters don't take the single
low full toss; driven straight to mid-off for another dot. Pant said no with a smile on his face
Rishabh Pant hits the winning runs! Overpitched outside off; the LSG captain leans forward to elevate it over mid-off. A bright smile on Pant's face as LSG win by 5 wickets
